text:
Created attachment 160736
Shell archive of port

mFi is a M2M management software solution from Ubiquiti Networks
designed to work with Ubiquiti's mFi product line.

The mFi Controller software allows you to monitor and manage your
mPort, mPower, mSensor, and other supported devices from a web
browser. It also allows you to create rules that trigger actions
based on events and data from your mFi sensors.

WWW: https://www.ubnt.com/mfi/
